title: galanthus nivalis subsp. byzantinus
intro: Galanthus nivalis subsp. byzantinus, also known as the Byzantine snowdrop, is a subspecies of the snowdrop plant (Galanthus nivalis) that is native to Turkey. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Galanthus nivalis subsp. byzantinus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antiseptic to treat wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
